title: Binalonan Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Binalonan with a Z-Score of +3.11. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Binalonan is causing significant discomfort with a high temperature and humidity level of 81%. 
 The CDD value of 9.9 GG indicates a very high cooling demand, while the HDD value of 0.0 GG shows no heating demand. 
 The low wind speed of 3.5 km/h is exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
